topStories.title: Punjab: Veteran Congress leader Lal Singh passes away
topStories.description: He complained of breathing difficulties earlier this afternoon at his Chandigarh residence. He was rushed to the hospital in Mohali, where he breathed his last.

topStories.title: MEA denies Elon Musk joined Modi-Trump call regarding West Asia war, refutes New York Times report
topStories.description: India's MEA confirmed that Prime Minister Modi and US President Trump had a private call, refuting claims of Elon Musk's participation. They discussed the West Asia conflict and the importance of the Strait of Hormuz.

topStories.title: Indian government refutes report of Elon Musk joining Modi-Trump phone call
topStories.description: The government clarifies Elon Musk did not join the phone call between PM Modi and US President Trump on West Asia tensions.

topStories.title: US-Iran war: Kuwait International Airport hit by drone attacks, radar system severely damaged
topStories.description: Kuwait International Airport faced multiple drone attacks on Saturday, which damaged its radar system. No casualties occurred, but the incident follows a previous attack on 25 March. Shuwaikh Port also sustained damage from a drone strike, impacting the country's trade operations.

topStories.title: Call between PM Modi and Donald Trump only: India on reports of Elon Musk joining phone conversation
topStories.description: Elon Musk joined the phone call between Prime Minister Modi and US President Donald Trump that took place on Tuesday over West Asia conflict.

topStories.title: 'Epstein Island' replaces White House name on Android, Google blames fake Maps edit
topStories.description: A technical glitch caused the White House switchboard number to appear as 'Epstein Island' on some Android devices. Google confirmed the glitch and said it was due to a fake edit on Google Maps.

topStories.title: ‘Suspend flights in high-risk conflict zones’ in West Asia': Pilots' body writes to DGCA, seeks war risk insurance cover
topStories.description: Iran-US war: The pilot's association mentioned in its letter to the DGCA that “the current belligerents, USA, Israel and Iran have shot down civilian airlines in the fog of war of previous conflicts.”

dailyNews.title: Osmania University’s academic senate approves 2026-27 budget
'If you think you can do it better...': Marco Rubio, EU official had heated exchange over Russia at G7 meet, says report
dailyNews.description: During a discussion at the G7 meeting on Friday, United States Secretary of State Marco Rubio reportedly fired back at EU foreign policy chief Kaja Kallas over a question on Russia-Ukraine war.

dailyNews.title: Influencer Clavicular arrested on battery charge in Florida
dailyNews.description: Peters is accused of instigating a fight between two women and then posting a video of it on social media, authorities told the BBC.

dailyNews.title: Quote of the day by Denzel Washington: ‘Goals on the road to achievement cannot be achieved without…’
dailyNews.description: This quote from Denzel Washington is a straightforward yet profound declaration about the true ingredients of success.

dailyNews.title: Puducherry Congress leader AV Subramanian resigns from all party positions ahead of assembly polls
dailyNews.description: Subramanian cited ‘private reasons and unavoidable circumstances’ as reasons for the decision in a letter to V Vaithilingam, Puducherry Congress chief.

dailyNews.title: House Republicans reject Senate deal, prolonging partial government shutdown
dailyNews.description: Airport security agents have not been paid in more than a month due to a congressional impasse, causing travel chaos across the US.

dailyNews.title: Big win for Argentina — US appeals court reverses $16 billion ruling linked to oil company seizure
dailyNews.description: The appeals court ruling marks a significant victory for Argentine President Javier Milei and helps clear the government’s path to a return to international markets at some point.

dailyNews.title: Wild Ultimatums and ‘Bombing Our Little Hearts Out’: A Portrait of Trump at War
dailyNews.description: President Trump has vacillated between boasting about U.S. military superiority and deep frustration that his war of choice is not always having the desired effects.

dailyNews.title: In an Asymmetrical War, Iran Seeks an Edge With Its Information War
dailyNews.description: Propaganda and disinformation have flooded the internet in a sophisticated effort to undermine support for U.S. and Israeli attacks.

dailyNews.title: House Vote Sets Up Clash With the Senate on D.H.S. Funding, Prolonging Shutdown
dailyNews.description: Republicans revolted over a Senate measure to fund the Department of Homeland Security and passed a rival bill, dimming the chances of a quick end to the crisis crippling airports.

dailyNews.title: Castro Heirs Emerge Across Cuba’s Political Scene Amid Energy Crisis and Trump Threats
dailyNews.description: As Trump officials demand changes, Castro family members are suddenly popping up across Cuba’s political scene. Some even ask: Could one be the “Cuban Delcy?”

dailyNews.title: Hegseth Criticized for Removing Four Officers From Promotion List
dailyNews.description: Bitter rifts have opened over the defense secretary’s campaign to reverse policies that he says are prejudiced against white officers.

dailyNews.title: Trump Offers More Aid to Farmers, a Key Support Bloc Hurt by Tariffs and War
dailyNews.description: The president announced new loan guarantees at a White House event that appeared intended to reassure a group that has found itself caught in the crosshairs of some of his major policies.

dailyNews.title: A Challenge for ‘No Kings’ Protests, the Third Time Around
dailyNews.description: Organizers want this to be largest protest yet. But is hitting a number enough to deliver an effective political movement?

dailyNews.title: ‘No Kings’ Protests Across U.S. Cities: What We Know
dailyNews.description: Thousands of demonstrations against the Trump administration are scheduled to take place in cities and towns across the country on Saturday.

dailyNews.title: Kaela Berg, a Flight Attendant, Runs for Congress One Layover at a Time
dailyNews.description: Kaela Berg is part of a crop of working-class candidates that Democrats hope can help the party win back blue-collar voters.

topStories.description: The Conservative Political Action Conference typically seeks to establish orthodoxy with its roster of speakers. This year, organizers created space for dissent, highlighting ongoing schisms in the MAGA movement.

dailyNews.title: Trump administration says TSA workers can expect pay as early as Monday
dailyNews.description: President Trump signed an executive action on Friday that promises to pay TSA workers immediately as Congress remains at odds over Department of Homeland Security funds and the partial shutdown drags on. New DHS Secretary Markwayne Mullin said TSA officers can expect paychecks as early as Monday.

dailyNews.title: Iran war rages, Strait of Hormuz still blocked as Trump pushes for a deal
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration is awaiting Iran's formal response to its 15-point peace proposal, as Tehran continues blocking the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Republicans stand by Trump on Iran, but are split on how war could end
dailyNews.description: At this year's CPAC, many attendees toed a fine line between backing the war in Iran and worrying about how the conflict could expand.

dailyNews.title: "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan" guests for March 29, 2026
dailyNews.description: This week's guests include White House border czar Tom Homan, Democratic Rep. Jim Himes, and former U.S. Surgeon General Dr. Jerome Adams.

dailyNews.title: 2/20: The Takeout with Major Garrett
dailyNews.description: Supreme Court strikes down Trump's emergency tariffs; U.S. and Canada to face off for gold medal in men's hockey

dailyNews.title: Markets plunge and U.S. oil hits $100 as Trump's attempt to reassure Wall Street fails
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump is used to bending financial markets to his will

dailyNews.title: Third round of 'No Kings' protests are expected to be the largest so far, organizers say
dailyNews.description: Millions are expected to gather across the country and around the world on Saturday for a third round of “No Kings” protests against President Donald Trump.

dailyNews.title: How the big oil and gas CEOs think the Iran war supply disruption will play out
dailyNews.description: The oil industry's grim outlook for global oil and gas supplies stands in contrast to the Trump administration's promise that the disruption is short term.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.

dailyNews.title: Canada Is Becoming a Fentanyl Exporter, and a Target for Trump
dailyNews.description: The drug is increasingly manufactured in and trafficked from the U.S.’s northern neighbor, though the numbers remain small compared with Mexico.
